---
title: "Harriet Emma Lockhart Baker"
---

## Harriet Emma Lockhart Baker

**Dates:** (1824/5-1909)

**Maiden name:** (Cox)

### Description

possibly the Mrs Baker whose paper on New Zealand CMY turned down

### Biography

Although there is little evidence, the most likely candidate is this person, wife of the Rev. Arthur Baker (1816-1868), who returned from New Zealand under a cloud in 1859, the year of his marriage to Harriet Cox, sister of one of W. J. Butler\'s curates at Wantage.

[Blain, <i>[[otherbook:576]Biographical Directory of Anglicans in the Pacific]</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 22nd [1860-1890]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
